_note: TRADE — the PROBE for TEMPLATE #5 (prices + merchant). Two markets under one hold: PRODUCER (stock piles up → cheap) and CONSUMER (stock drains → dear). Left alone, the price GAP blows wide open. A MERCHANT co-located with both buys from whichever is cheapest (@min price) and sells to whichever is dearest (@max price), moving stock from surplus to scarcity — so his running NARROWS the gap. THE GATE: the hold's `field` (= the price gap, what `live` sparklines) should START HIGH and TREND DOWN as he trades. Flip the merchant's scores to 0 (the counterfactual) and the gap stays pinned wide. Distant scarcity reaches a buyer as HIS price, no event feed — the catalog's information-carrier.

generators._markets_note: index 0 = the PRODUCER (starts flush, cheap), index 1 = the CONSUMER (starts bare, dear). `flow` = per-tick stock change absent trade: the producer makes goods, the consumer eats them.

rules._price_note: ★ PRICE = f(STOCK) (template #5). Scarcity is dear, glut is cheap — the proven suppression pattern applied to commerce. Producer + consumer flows push stock (and so price) apart every tick; the merchant is the only force pulling them back.

rules._merchant_mid_note: the merchant carries no price of its own; park its `price` at the MEAN of the two markets (here_mean over its co-located peers) so it never becomes the hold's min or max — then the hold's gap below reads the real market extremes, not the trader.

rules._gap_note: THE GATE — the hold's `field` is the live price gap (dearest minus cheapest), which `live` sparklines. Watch it fall as the merchant runs.

actions._buy_note: ★ BUY LOW (template #5) — when he has room and isn't mid-trip, buy a unit from the CHEAPEST co-located market (@min:target.price picks it): its stock drops (so its price RISES), his carry grows. cd = a short haul before the next deal (the travel that Atlas will make a real route).
actions.name: buy_low

actions._sell_note: ★ SELL HIGH — carrying goods and not mid-trip, sell a unit into the DEAREST market (@max:target.price): its stock rises (price FALLS), his carry shrinks, a trip is booked. Buying-cheap + selling-dear both close the gap from opposite ends.
actions.name: sell_high

events.label: ⚖ the price gap narrows — goods are flowing
🤝 the two markets nearly converge — arbitrage done its work
the merchant has run the road many times
